image_target_page.describe_image_target: ja Image Targets allow for 8th Wall web apps to detect and track uploaded images that map to both flat and curved surfaces. Examples include product packaging, signs, cups, bottles and more.
image_target_page.describe_max_targets: ja You may track up to 5 image targets with World Tracking enabled or up to 10 when it is disabled.
image_target_page.describe_api_cta: ja Dynamically select active image targets at runtime via API. <1>Learn More in Documentation ›</1>
image_target_page.edit_image_target.head: ja Edit Conical Image Target
image_target_page.edit_image_target.meta: ja Metadata must be {{metadataLimit}} characters or less.
image_target_page.edit_image_target.erro: ja These measurements are not valid. Please ensure the Label Width is less than the Cylinder Circumference.
ja The image is not a valid size with this alignment. Please position the image so that it exceeds {{min_long_length}}x{{min_short_length}}
ja The image is not a valid size with this alignment. Please position the image so that it exceeds {{min_short_length}}x{{min_long_length}}
ja This image is too small to be used as an image target. Minimum dimensions for the flattened image are {{min_short_length}}x{{min_long_length}}.
ja The image height is too big. Please crop the image or upload a smaller size image.
image_target_page.edit_image_target.imag: ja Use the camera app to scan and open link.
ja 2) Point device at screen or physical object
ja Use the simulator or physical object IRL to assess the image target tracking quality.
ja If the mesh overlay appears incorrect, modify the properties and reload mobile site.
image_target_page.edit_image_target.prev: ja This image has been removed in accordance with our <1>terms</1> and can only be deleted.
image_target_page.metadata_modal.descrip: ja Link specific data to your image targets and access it at runtime via xrimage events.
image_target_page.metadata_modal.sample_: ja Check out the sample project

project_dashboard_page.redirect_url.moda: ja This URL will be used to automatically redirect your users to a different site when your project has ended.
project_dashboard_page.cta.upgrade_plan: ja <0>Upgrade your plan</0> to access custom domains
ja 8th Wall supports the use of custom domains for both self-hosted projects and 8th Wall-hosted projects. If you are self-hosting, you will need to whitelist your domain/sub-domain. If you are using 8th Wall hosting and want to use your own domain/sub-domain you will have to configure your DNS server to point the domain/sub-domain at 8th Wall's infrastructure.
ja Setup your domain to point to this 8th Wall-hosted project
